LessonCache.title: LessonCache
LessonCache.description: Stores dynamically generated language lessons to ensure fast retrieval and avoid regenerating content for every user. These lessons are shared across all users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LessonCache entity, typically formatted as '{language}_{path}_week{N}' (e.g., 'french_survival_week1').

lessonJson.description: The complete lesson content for a full week as a stringified JSON object.

cachedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this lesson was generated and stored in the cache.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores individual user preferences, settings, and overall account information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, matching the Firebase Authentication user ID (uid).

selectedLanguage.description: The target language the user is currently learning (e.g., 'French').

subscriptionType.description: The user's current subscription level: 'free', 'monthly', or 'yearly'.

xpPoints.description: Total experience points accumulated by the user.

currentStreak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has completed at least one lesson.

lastActiveDate.description: The date of the user's last recorded activity.

aiPlanningEnabled.description: A flag indicating if AI plans weekly themes.

AdminUser.title: AdminUser
AdminUser.description: Represents a user with administrative privileges.

uid.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the admin user.

definition.description: Stores individual user preferences and settings.
Stores cached, AI-generated weekly lesson plans.
Collection to store admin user roles.
